title: Trial by Fire
description: The evidence narrows things down — but not all the way. Mark every potion this pair could still produce.

hints.text: "Possible potions" means every outcome that occurs in at least one of the remaining 5760 possible worlds. The clues haven't pinned down the exact alchemicals for ing4 and ing7, so multiple outcomes are possible — collect all of them.

Distribution across 5760 worlds (ing4+ing7):
  B+: 960 worlds (16%)
  B-: 960 worlds (16%)
  G-: 960 worlds (16%)
  R+: 960 worlds (16%)
  R-: 960 worlds (16%)
  neutral: 960 worlds (16%)
